consistency_checks: Endpoint count on / (dashboard) must match /endpoints total count
Endpoint status on /endpoints list must match /endpoints/:id detail header
Endpoint CVE count on /endpoints list must match /endpoints/:id CVE Exposure tab count
Endpoint patch count on /endpoints list must match /endpoints/:id Patches tab count
Endpoint compliance score on /endpoints/:id must match /compliance/frameworks/:id endpoints tab
Patch severity count on /patches filter chips must match /patches severity-counts API
Patch CVE list on /patches/:id must match CVEs referencing this patch on /cves
Patch affected endpoint count on /patches/:id must reflect endpoints with matching CVEs
CVE summary counts on /cves must match /cves/summary API
CVE linked patches on /cves/:id must appear on corresponding /patches/:id
CVE affected endpoints on /cves/:id must match /endpoints/:id CVE Exposure tab
Policy enabled state on /policies list must match /policies/:id detail
Policy mode on /policies list must match /policies/:id overview
Policy referenced on /deployments/:id must match /policies/:id data
Deployment status on /deployments list must match /deployments/:id header
Deployment target count on /deployments list must match /deployments/:id targets
Active deployment count on / (dashboard) must match /deployments filtered by active statuses
Deployment on /endpoints/:id Deployments tab must match /deployments/:id
Workflow status on /workflows list must match the editor state
Workflow node count on /workflows expanded row must match editor canvas
Framework score on /compliance card must match /compliance/frameworks/:id header
Framework control count on /compliance card must match Controls tab row count
Overall compliance score on / (dashboard) must match /compliance overall score card
Overdue control count on /compliance must only include enabled frameworks
Alert unread count in sidebar badge must match /alerts/count API
Alert severity breakdown in badge (critical vs warning) must match /alerts filtered counts
Tag count on /settings/tags must match tag options in policy form
Tags assigned to endpoint on /endpoints/:id must match /settings/tags member list
Role list on /settings/roles must match role options on /settings/user-roles
Catalog entry count on hub / must match /catalog total
Catalog entry CVE count on /catalog list must match /catalog/:id CVE table count
Feed active count on hub / must match /feeds filtered by active
Feed entry count on /feeds list must match /feeds/:id total entries
Feed status on /feeds list must match /feeds/:id header
License status on /licenses list must match /licenses/:id header
License endpoint usage on /licenses list must match /licenses/:id gauge
License assigned client on /licenses/:id must match /clients/:id license info
Client count on hub / must match /clients total
Client health score on /clients list must match /clients/:id header
Client pending count on sidebar badge must match /clients filtered by pending
Client license tier on /clients list must match /clients/:id overview

flows.name: Triage and Deploy to Vulnerable Endpoint

steps.action: View endpoints list, sort by risk score descending
Click highest-risk endpoint, review CVE Exposure tab
Switch to Patches tab, identify available patches
Click Deploy Critical or open DeploymentWizard
Monitor deployment progress, verify status transitions
Return to endpoint, verify CVE count decreased and patch applied

cross_page_assertions: Risk score on /endpoints list must decrease after successful deployment
CVE count on /endpoints/:id must decrease after patch applied
Deployment status on /deployments/:id must reach 'completed'
Patch status on /endpoints/:id Patches tab must show 'deployed'

flows.name: Create Policy and Deploy Patches

steps.action: Create policy with severity filter, assign tags, set mode
Review policy detail, verify matched groups and patches
Click Evaluate to preview matched endpoints/patches
Open DeploymentWizard from policy, configure waves
Monitor deployment waves, check target statuses
Verify endpoint received correct patches

cross_page_assertions: Policy appears in /policies list after creation
New deployment on /deployments references the correct policy
Deployment target count matches policy evaluation preview
Endpoint patches tab shows patches from this deployment

flows.name: Assess Compliance Posture

steps.action: View overall score and framework cards
Click Evaluate All, verify feedback toast
Click View Details on a framework
Review Controls tab — check pass/fail/partial statuses
Review Endpoints tab — identify non-compliant endpoints
Click non-compliant endpoint, check Compliance tab
Navigate back, verify scores updated after evaluation

cross_page_assertions: Framework score on /compliance card matches /compliance/frameworks/:id header
Control count on /compliance card matches Controls tab row count
Evaluate All updates scores on both /compliance and /compliance/frameworks/:id
Non-compliant endpoint list on framework detail matches endpoint compliance score

flows.name: Deployment Lifecycle (Create, Monitor, Cancel/Retry/Rollback)

steps.action: Open DeploymentWizard, create ad-hoc deployment
Verify new deployment appears in list with 'created' status
Click into deployment, observe wave progression
Cancel deployment — verify only pending/sent targets cancelled
On a failed deployment, click Retry — verify only failed targets re-queued
On a running deployment, click Rollback — verify state transition

cross_page_assertions: Deployment status on /deployments list matches /deployments/:id header at all times
Target counts on /deployments list match /deployments/:id target breakdown
Active deployment count on / (dashboard) updates when deployment completes
Cancel only affects pending/sent targets, not executing/completed

flows.name: Build and Execute a Workflow

steps.action: Click New Workflow
Drag trigger, filter, deployment_wave, notification nodes onto canvas
Connect nodes, configure each node's properties
Save workflow (validates DAG), then Publish
Return to list, verify workflow appears as 'published'
Execute workflow from list actions, monitor execution

cross_page_assertions: Workflow appears in /workflows list after save
Workflow status changes from 'draft' to 'published' after publish
Node count in /workflows expanded row matches editor canvas
Unsaved changes guard prevents accidental navigation

flows.name: Investigate CVE and Remediate

steps.action: Filter by cisa_kev=true or exploit_available=true
Click critical CVE, review CVSS vector breakdown
Check linked patches and affected endpoints
Navigate to linked patch, review remediation details
Deploy patch via DeploymentWizard
Verify affected endpoint shows CVE as patched

cross_page_assertions: CVE linked patches on /cves/:id appear on /patches/:id
CVE affected endpoints on /cves/:id match /endpoints/:id CVE Exposure tab
After deployment, CVE status changes from 'affected' to 'patched' on endpoint

flows.name: Sync Feed Catalog to Patch Managers

steps.action: Review feed health, identify any failing feeds
Click into feed, trigger manual sync
Navigate to catalog, verify new entries appeared
Check catalog entry detail, Distribution tab for PM sync status
Verify CVE linkage and severity on Overview tab

cross_page_assertions: Feed entry count on /feeds list increases after sync
New catalog entries appear in /catalog after feed sync
Catalog entry source badge matches the feed that synced it
CVE count on /catalog list matches /catalog/:id CVE table

flows.name: Issue, Assign, and Manage Licenses

steps.action: Generate new license via form dialog
Click into license, assign to approved client
Navigate to client, verify license tier shown
Return to license, check usage history tab
Renew license with new expiry date
Verify updated expiry and status in list

cross_page_assertions: New license appears in /licenses list after creation
License assignment shows on both /licenses/:id and /clients/:id
License status computation (active/expiring/expired) is consistent across list and detail
License endpoint usage on list matches detail gauge

flows.name: Onboard New Patch Manager Client

steps.action: See new pending client in list (pending badge in sidebar)
Approve client — copy API key from confirmation dialog
Navigate to client detail, verify status is 'approved'
Navigate to licenses, assign a license to the new client
Return to client, verify license info and health score

cross_page_assertions: Pending badge decrements after approval
Client status changes from 'pending' to 'approved' immediately
API key is shown only once during approval (security)
Health score starts at 65 for newly approved client with no sync history

flows.name: Monitor Agent Patch Status

steps.action: Check agent status — enrollment, pending patch count, resource usage
Navigate to pending patches, review severity breakdown
Trigger manual scan, verify scan fires
Return to pending, verify list updated after scan
Check deployment history timeline for recent activity

cross_page_assertions: Pending patch count on / status page matches /pending total count
Enrollment status on / matches TopBar connection indicator
History events on /history reflect completed deployments

business_rules.rule: Default page size is 50, maximum is 200, minimum is 1
business_rules.test: Open any list page — default rows must be 50; ?limit=999 clamps to 200

business_rules.rule: Cursor-based pagination uses (created_at, id) keyset, not offset
business_rules.test: Navigate pages; inserting records between fetches must not cause duplicates or missing rows

business_rules.rule: Every query is scoped to the authenticated tenant; cross-tenant data is never returned
business_rules.test: Log in as Tenant B; confirm Tenant A resources invisible

business_rules.rule: Decommissioned endpoints are excluded from all lists by default
business_rules.test: Decommission an endpoint; it must disappear from /endpoints list

business_rules.rule: Endpoints list sorted newest-first (created_at DESC)
business_rules.test: Enroll new endpoint; must appear first in /endpoints

business_rules.rule: Endpoint list supports filtering by status, os_family, search (hostname ILIKE), and tag_id simultaneously
business_rules.test: Apply each filter individually and in combination

business_rules.rule: Endpoint CVE counts include only 'affected' status CVEs
business_rules.test: Mark CVE as patched; endpoint CVE count must decrease

business_rules.rule: Endpoint pending patch count counts only active-state deployment targets (pending, sent, executing, running)
business_rules.test: Complete a deployment; pending patch count drops

business_rules.rule: Available patches match by package name and exclude already-deployed patches
business_rules.test: Deploy a patch; it disappears from available patches list

business_rules.rule: Patches list sorted newest-first (created_at DESC)
business_rules.test: Sync new patch; appears at top of /patches

business_rules.rule: Patches list supports filtering by severity, os_family, os_distribution, status, and search
business_rules.test: Apply each filter on /patches

business_rules.rule: Patch remediation % = (endpoints with all linked CVEs patched) / (total affected endpoints) x 100
business_rules.test: Patch endpoint CVEs; remediation % increases

business_rules.rule: Deployment history per patch limited to 20 most recent
business_rules.test: Create 21+ deployments for a patch; detail shows max 20

business_rules.rule: Affected endpoints per patch limited to 50
business_rules.test: 51+ affected endpoints; patch detail shows 50

business_rules.rule: Patch status for endpoint derived from CVE statuses, not deployment status
business_rules.test: Deploy patch; status='deployed' only when all CVEs are 'patched'

business_rules.rule: Group name is required for create and update
business_rules.test: Submit empty group name; error 'name is required'

business_rules.rule: Groups list sorted oldest-first (created_at ASC)
business_rules.test: Oldest group appears first

business_rules.rule: Soft-deleted groups excluded from all lists and policy assignments
business_rules.test: Delete group; disappears from lists and policy selector

business_rules.rule: Setting group members is a full replacement (atomic remove-all then add-new)
business_rules.test: SetMembers with [B,C] on group with [A,B]; only B,C remain

business_rules.rule: Policy name is required
business_rules.test: Create policy with empty name; error shown

business_rules.rule: selection_mode must be one of: all_available, by_severity, by_cve_list, by_regex
business_rules.test: Submit invalid selection_mode

business_rules.rule: When selection_mode=by_severity, min_severity required and must be critical/high/medium/low
business_rules.test: Select By Severity without choosing severity; error shown

business_rules.rule: When selection_mode=by_cve_list, cve_ids must be non-empty
business_rules.test: Select By CVE list with no CVEs; error shown

business_rules.rule: When selection_mode=by_regex, package_regex must be present and valid
business_rules.test: Submit invalid regex; error about invalid regex

business_rules.rule: Policy mode defaults to 'manual'; must be manual/automatic/advisory
business_rules.test: Create policy without mode; defaults to 'manual'

business_rules.rule: deployment_strategy defaults to all_at_once; must be all_at_once or rolling
business_rules.test: Create policy; strategy defaults to 'all_at_once'

business_rules.rule: Maintenance window (mw_start/mw_end) must be HH:MM format, both provided or both omitted
business_rules.test: Set mw_start without mw_end; error. Set mw_start='25:00'; error

business_rules.rule: Policy severity filter cascades: min_severity includes that level and all higher
business_rules.test: Policy with min_severity=high matches both high and critical patches

business_rules.rule: Policies list sorted oldest-first (created_at ASC)
business_rules.test: Oldest policy appears first in /policies

business_rules.rule: Soft-deleted policies never returned; deletion irreversible
business_rules.test: Delete policy; disappears permanently

business_rules.rule: policy_id required for source_type=policy; endpoint_ids and patch_ids required for adhoc
business_rules.test: Create policy deployment without policy_id; error MISSING_POLICY_ID

business_rules.rule: Wave percentage values must sum exactly to 100
business_rules.test: Configure waves at 30%+60%; error 'must sum to 100'

business_rules.rule: Default wave config is single wave at 100%, success_threshold=0.80, error_rate_max=0.20
business_rules.test: Create deployment without wave config; detail shows 1 wave at 100%

business_rules.rule: Deployment targets randomly shuffled before wave assignment
business_rules.test: Two identical deployments may have different target ordering

business_rules.rule: Deployment with scheduled_at starts as 'scheduled'; without starts as 'created'
business_rules.test: Create scheduled deployment; status='scheduled' not 'created'

business_rules.rule: Deployment status transitions enforced: created->running, running->completed/failed, failed->running(retry), created|running->cancelled, running|failed->rolling_back
business_rules.test: On completed deployment, Cancel unavailable. On failed, Retry available

business_rules.rule: Deploying disabled policy returns 422 POLICY_DISABLED
business_rules.test: Disable policy; deploy from it; error shown

business_rules.rule: Deploying policy with no matching endpoints returns 422 NO_ENDPOINTS
business_rules.test: Policy with empty group; deploy; error shown

business_rules.rule: Deploying policy with no matching patches returns 422 NO_PATCHES
business_rules.test: Policy with severity=critical, no critical patches; deploy; error

business_rules.rule: Deployment auto-fails when failure rate exceeds threshold (default 20%)
business_rules.test: 5 targets, 2 fail (40%>20%); deployment auto-transitions to 'failed'

business_rules.rule: Cancel only affects pending and sent targets; executing/succeeded/failed targets unchanged
business_rules.test: Cancel running deployment; executing targets keep their status

business_rules.rule: Retry only available for failed deployments; only failed targets re-queued
business_rules.test: Retry failed deployment; succeeded targets remain succeeded

business_rules.rule: Deployment list sorted oldest-first (created_at ASC)
business_rules.test: Oldest deployment appears first

business_rules.rule: Deployment list filterable by status, policy_id, created_after/before (RFC3339)
business_rules.test: Filter by status=running; only running shown

business_rules.rule: Deployment schedule requires policy_id and valid 5-field cron expression
business_rules.test: Schedule with invalid cron; error INVALID_CRON_EXPRESSION

business_rules.rule: CVEs filterable by severity, cisa_kev, exploit_available, attack_vector, has_patch, published_after, search
business_rules.test: Filter cisa_kev=true; only KEV-listed CVEs shown

business_rules.rule: CVEs list sorted newest-first (created_at DESC)
business_rules.test: Newest CVE appears first

business_rules.rule: CVE published_after filter requires RFC3339 format
business_rules.test: Pass published_after=2024-01-01 (no time); error shown

business_rules.rule: Related CVEs for a CVE detail limited to 10, ordered by CVSS descending
business_rules.test: CVE detail related section shows max 10, highest CVSS first

business_rules.rule: Alerts list sorted newest-first (created_at DESC)
business_rules.test: Newest alert first in /alerts

business_rules.rule: Alerts filterable by severity, category, status, date range, and search (title/description ILIKE)
business_rules.test: Apply each filter on /alerts

business_rules.rule: Alert bulk-update only affects alerts created within the last 90 days
business_rules.test: Bulk mark-as-read; alerts >90 days remain unread

business_rules.rule: Alert unread counts broken out by severity: critical, warning, info, total
business_rules.test: Badge/count shows separate numbers per severity

business_rules.rule: Overall compliance score = average of all enabled framework tenant-level scores
business_rules.test: Enable 2 frameworks at 80% and 60%; overall ~70%

business_rules.rule: Endpoint compliant threshold is 95% (strictest scoring)
business_rules.test: 94% score endpoint NOT counted as compliant

business_rules.rule: Compliance CVE states: COMPLIANT, AT_RISK, NON_COMPLIANT, LATE_REMEDIATION based on SLA timeline
business_rules.test: CVE within SLA=COMPLIANT; past deadline unpatched=NON_COMPLIANT; patched after deadline=LATE_REMEDIATION

business_rules.rule: Compliance score = (compliant_cves / total_cves) x 100; empty=100
business_rules.test: Endpoint with no CVEs shows 100%; 1 compliant + 1 non-compliant shows 50%

business_rules.rule: Overdue controls = status fail/partial + sla_deadline < now + enabled frameworks only
business_rules.test: Overdue controls section only shows controls from enabled frameworks

business_rules.rule: Non-compliant endpoints per framework limited to 100, sorted by score ascending (worst first)
business_rules.test: Framework detail shows max 100 non-compliant, lowest score first

business_rules.rule: Built-in compliance frameworks: NIST-800-53, PCI-DSS, CIS, HIPAA, ISO-27001, SOC-2
business_rules.test: All 6 frameworks appear in available frameworks list

business_rules.rule: Dashboard deployments_running includes status created AND running (not scheduled)
business_rules.test: Scheduled deployment does NOT increment running counter

business_rules.rule: Dashboard deployments_completed_today counts completions with completed_at on current calendar day
business_rules.test: Complete deployment; counter increments. Yesterday's don't count

business_rules.rule: Dashboard overdue_sla_count = deployments in created/running status older than 24 hours
business_rules.test: Deployment not overdue initially; after 24h appears in overdue

business_rules.rule: Dashboard endpoint risk score = min(10, (critical*3 + high*2 + medium) / 10), limited to 30 endpoints
business_rules.test: Add critical CVEs; risk score increases toward max 10

business_rules.rule: Dashboard active deployments widget shows at most 5
business_rules.test: Start 6 concurrent deployments; widget shows only 5

business_rules.rule: Policy evaluation blocked outside maintenance window
business_rules.test: Set MW 09:00-17:00; evaluate at 20:00; blocked

business_rules.rule: Policy evaluation patches only match by OS family; no cross-OS assignment
business_rules.test: Policy covering Linux+Windows; Linux patches only to Linux endpoints

business_rules.rule: Hub client registration requires hostname; unauthenticated, returns bootstrap token
business_rules.test: Register without hostname; error. With hostname; token returned

business_rules.rule: All resource IDs in URL paths must be valid UUIDs
business_rules.test: GET /api/v1/endpoints/not-a-uuid returns 400

business_rules.rule: Malformed pagination cursor returns 400 INVALID_CURSOR
business_rules.test: Pass ?cursor=garbage; 400 error

business_rules.rule: Frontend: Endpoint risk score >= 7 = critical (red), >= 4 = warning, < 4 = healthy
business_rules.test: Endpoint with many critical CVEs shows red risk indicator

business_rules.rule: Frontend: CVSS >= 9.0 = critical, >= 7.0 = warning, >= 4.0 = secondary, < 4.0 = muted
business_rules.test: CVE badges colored correctly by CVSS score

business_rules.rule: Frontend: Compliance >= 95% = Compliant, >= 80% = Needs Improvement, < 80% = Non-Compliant
business_rules.test: Framework at 94% shows 'Needs Improvement' not 'Compliant'

business_rules.rule: Frontend: Deployment polling stops on terminal statuses (completed, failed, cancelled, rolled_back, rollback_failed)
business_rules.test: Completed deployment stops auto-refreshing

business_rules.rule: Frontend: Alert badge red when critical_unread > 0, yellow when only warning_unread > 0; polls every 30s
business_rules.test: Critical unread alert = red badge; warning only = yellow badge

business_rules.rule: Hub: Feed is 'failing' if status=idle AND last 5 completed history runs all failed
business_rules.test: Idle feed with 5 consecutive failures shows 'failing' status

business_rules.rule: Hub: License status computed as: revoked_at -> revoked; expired; <=30 days -> expiring; else active
business_rules.test: License expiring in 25 days shows 'expiring' badge

business_rules.rule: Hub: Client health score based on last_sync recency: <30m=100, <1h=90, <6h=75, <24h=60, <7d=30, else=10
business_rules.test: Client synced 2h ago shows health score 75

business_rules.rule: Hub: Only approved clients appear in license assignment dropdown
business_rules.test: Pending client not available for license assignment

business_rules.rule: Hub: Pending client count badge polls every 30s in sidebar
business_rules.test: Approve pending client; badge decrements within 30s

business_rules.rule: Agent: enrollment_status=enrolled means healthy/connected; drives TopBar dot color
business_rules.test: Enrolled agent shows green dot; non-enrolled shows red

business_rules.rule: Agent: Heartbeat within 180s = Connected; never = Awaiting; stale = Heartbeat stale
business_rules.test: Check server connection card text matches heartbeat recency

business_rules.rule: Agent: ProgressBar/GaugeBar thresholds: >85% = critical, >70% = warning, else accent
business_rules.test: CPU at 90% shows critical (red) color bar

business_rules.rule: Agent: Services default filter is 'running' not 'all'
business_rules.test: Navigate to /services; only running services shown by default

business_rules.rule: Agent: Settings bandwidth validation: 0=unlimited, else 64-102400 Kbps
business_rules.test: Set bandwidth to 50 Kbps; error shown. Set to 0; accepted

business_rules.rule: Agent: Settings PUT sends only dirty fields (diff before send)
business_rules.test: Change one field; only that field in PUT body

business_rules.rule: Agent: Trigger Scan has 5-second UI cooldown
business_rules.test: Click Trigger Scan; button disabled for 5s with 'Scan Triggered' text

business_rules.rule: Agent: Install/Skip buttons on pending patches are UI-only (no mutation wired)
business_rules.test: Click Install/Skip; no API call made
